description: Pluggable launch-mode slot for prompt-driven launch planning, narrative packaging, and outbound execution.

fields.name: promptSource
fields.description: Relative path to the Markdown prompt source that drives this launch mode.

fields.name: launchSurfaces
fields.description: Primary launch surfaces this mode prepares for, such as Product Hunt, Hacker News, social, or warm intros.

fields.name: audienceTracks
fields.description: Audience lanes this mode should tailor messaging for.

fields.name: outreachMode
fields.description: How hands-on the agent should be about sequencing, list-building, and follow-up.

fields.name: outputMode
fields.description: Expected output shape, such as a launch brief, asset pack, or channel-by-channel runbook.

fields.name: assetOutputs
fields.description: Assets this mode is expected to draft or assemble.

fields.name: successSignals
fields.description: Signals used to judge whether the launch plan is ready to ship.
